dashboard.title: System Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time telemetrics for XAuth Omega infrastructure
dashboard.anomaly_desc: Tracking failed vs successful validations (Crack Attempts)
dashboard.auditor_subtitle: Automated threat detection and anomalies scan
dashboard.auditor_no_ips: No brute-force or massive failed attempts detected recently.
dashboard.auditor_no_keys: No suspicious license sharing detected (Based on unique countries/IPs per key).

home.hero_desc: XAuth Omega is the ultimate cross-platform enterprise licensing infrastructure. Secure your applications, manage users globally, and prevent unauthorized access effortlessly.
home.features_subtitle: Everything you need to successfully distribute and protect your code.
home.feature1_desc: Fully encrypted handshake sessions ensuring your software logic is protected with dynamic nonces.
home.feature2_desc: Reliable device tracking across Windows, Linux, and macOS prevents unauthorized sharing of licenses.
home.feature3_desc: Monitor Daily Active Users, Anomaly tracking (cracking attempts), and global map distributions live.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal settings and identity

user_hub.title: License Hub
user_hub.subtitle: Manage your active software subscriptions and products
user_hub.redeem_hint: Redeem a product key above to activate your software.

apps.title: Application Hub
apps.subtitle: Create and manage your protectable software
apps.no_apps_desc: Deploy your first app to start issuing licenses.
apps.delete_confirm_msg: This action is irreversible. Deleting this application will instantly invalidate all associated license keys and terminate active user sessions.
apps.webhook_empty: No webhooks configured for this app yet.
apps.release_empty: No releases published yet. Use the gateway to deploy your first version.

licenses.title: License Forge
licenses.subtitle: Generating and managing security keys for your product
licenses.no_licenses_found: No licenses issued for this app yet.
licenses.security_note_desc: Banning a license will instantly invalidate sessions for any client using that key. HWID reset allows a user to move the software to a new machine. Provisioning is done in real-time.
licenses.delete_confirm_msg: This will permanently remove the license key from the system. Users will not be able to redeem or use it anymore.
licenses.regen_confirm_msg: This will void the current license string and generate a completely new one. Any client currently using the old string will be disconnected.
licenses.alter_confirm: Are you sure you want to {{action}} this license record? This will take immediate effect on all active sessions.
licenses.metadata_desc: These variables are returned to the client software during validation. Use JSON format to store feature flags, user roles, or custom configurations.
licenses.metadata_invalid_json: Invalid JSON format. Please check your syntax.

users.title: Identity Center
users.subtitle: Manage platform users and access levels
users.security_warning_desc: Modifying user roles can expose sensitive data. Deleting a user will cascade-delete all associated licenses and application configurations. The system administrator account (ID 1) is protected from deletion.
users.delete_msg: This operation is final. Deleting this user will remove all their data, including hosted applications and all associated license keys. This cannot be undone.

logs.title: Audit Trail
logs.subtitle: Real-time system activity and security events
